Feature Expansion —

Why We Are the Best

Unmatched Leverage

Supercharge your trading potential with up to 1000x leverage on select assets. Amplify your gains and minimize your risks, as DTX Exchange empowers you to control large positions with minimal capital, unlocking a world of profit potential.

120K+ Trading Instruments

Break free from limitations and explore a world of possibilities with our diverse range of trading instruments. Whether you're a seasoned investor or a novice trader, DTX Exchange offers something for everyone, from traditional assets to cutting-edge synths and derivatives.

All Information at Your Fingertip

Arm yourself with the most robust reference material at your fingertips. DTX offers a wealth of charts, graphs, and analytical tools, empowering you to make the best possible decisions and stay ahead of the curve.

Lightning Fast Execution

With our lightning-fast execution speeds, you can seize opportunities in the blink of an eye, ensuring you never miss a beat in the fast-paced world of trading. At an average execution speed of 0.04 seconds, you’ll book profits when your competitors are still in queue.

Quant and Algo Trading

Elevate your trading strategy with seamless integration for quantitative and algorithmic trading. Gain access to advanced tools and APIs that allow you to automate your trading strategies, execute trades with precision, and capitalize on market inefficiencies with unmatched efficiency and accuracy.

Compliant with International Financial Regulations

As a licensed platform, DTX maintains strict compliance with acting policies to safeguard your experience and protect your digital assets.

About Us —

Our Vision

DTX stands as a comprehensive investment platform catering to seasoned investors seeking access to a diverse array of financial instruments. Our cutting-edge products enable seamless investment across cryptocurrency, equities, forex, and more, all consolidated under one roof.

Driven by a commitment to excellence, we prioritize delivering an unmatched trading experience. Our zero-commission policy, expedited withdrawals, and rapid trade execution reflect our dedication to providing optimal conditions for investors. Furthermore, our strict adherence to regulatory standards ensures a secure and compliant investment environment.

We strive to provide the best trading experience in the industry.

How it works —

DTX Onboarding Process

Sign-Up or Connect Your Wallet

Start your investing journey by creating a DTX Account by signing up to our Presale Dashboard or Connecting your wallet.

Deposit funds

After logging into your dashboard, click on "Buy Now." Choose the currency and the quantity of $DTX tokens you'd like to exchange, then confirm to proceed with your order.

Start Trading

Confirm Order and Join Community' After confirming your order, the order details will be automatically generated, including the wallet address for you to send your desired cryptocurrency payment to. Your token balance will be visible in your account within one hour. Upon completion, join our communities on Telegram, Twitter, and Discord for the live and latest updates and announcements on DTX Exchange!

Key Features —

Explore Our Product Range

Crypto Trading

Navigate the volatile crypto market with swift transactions and comprehensive asset coverage, ensuring optimal investment opportunities tailored to your needs.

Foreign Exchange (FX)

Benefit from our efficient FX capabilities, enabling seamless conversion between foreign currencies, and facilitating global trading strategies with minimal friction.

DTX Wallet

Seamlessly store, manage, and transfer your cryptocurrency assets within a secure and user-friendly wallet environment, ensuring easy access to your funds whenever you need them.

Contract-For-Differences (CFDs)

Trade CFDs on DTX for enhanced investment flexibility. Trade on price movements of various assets leveraging our platform's precise execution and risk management.

Equities

Explore a wide range of stocks from global markets, leveraging our intuitive platform for efficient trading execution and strategic investment decisions.

Contract-For-Differences (CFDs)

Trade CFDs on DTX for enhanced investment flexibility. Trade on price movements of various assets leveraging our platform's precise execution and risk management.

Start Investing With 0 Commissions on DTX
Affiliate Program —

Become a Partner with DTX - Empower Your Community

Our DTX partner affiliate program allows you to empower your community. Become a part of an exceptional platform and get up to $1000 for every successful referral. Get direct payouts in your wallet or bank account. Our referral program is designed to benefit both referrers and referees with unparalleled benefits. The more people you refer, the higher you can earn with DTX.

Traders rank system —

DTX Black Club

Traders will have access to different benefits for having at least $10,000 on account. Some benefits include rakeback, monthly bonuses, level up bonuses (when you move e.g from bronze to silver), weekly bonuses, daily bonuses, and reimbursement from net losses. The more you have on account, the higher the bonuses.
